items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted cookie on any storefront request. Mirasvit released a patched version 1.11.12.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities, including arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Auth Bypass Vulnerability
items.summary: An Incorrect Authorization vulnerability allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to bypass security checks and gain unauthorized write access to Adobe Commerce. No user interaction is required for exploitation.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files using a polyglot technique to bypass validation. Sansec observed widespread exploitation attempts.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce | APSB26-05
items.summary: This update addresses critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to security feature bypass, application denial-of-service, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.
